hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format o; Add-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'ow-plugin.log') -Value ('[ow-plugin] Session started at ' + $timestamp)"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format o; Write-Output ('[ow-plugin] File modified at ' + $timestamp)"
